Variables.Name: CompressionQuality
Variables.Description: Platform agnostic compression quality. 1..100 with 1 being best compression and 100 being best quality.

Variables.Name: bLooping
Variables.Description: If set, when played directly (not through a sound cue) the wave will be played looping.

Variables.Name: bStreaming
Variables.Description: Whether this sound can be streamed to avoid increased memory usage

Variables.Name: StreamingPriority
Variables.Description: Priority of this sound when streaming (lower priority streams may not always play)

Variables.Name: bMature
Variables.Description: If set to true if this sound is considered to contain matureadult content.

Variables.Name: bManualWordWrap
Variables.Description: If set to true will disable automatic generation of line breaks - use if the subtitles have been split manually.

Variables.Name: bSingleLine
Variables.Description: If set to true the subtitles display as a sequence of single lines as opposed to multiline.

Variables.Name: bVirtualizeWhenSilent
Variables.Description: Allows sound to play at 0 volume, otherwise will stop the sound when the sound is silent.

Variables.Name: SpokenText
Variables.Description: A localized version of the text that is actually spoken phonetically in the audio.

Variables.Name: SubtitlePriority
Variables.Description: The priority of the subtitle.

Variables.Name: Volume
Variables.Description: Playback volume of sound 0 to 1 - Default is 1.0.

Variables.Name: Pitch
Variables.Description: Playback pitch for sound.

Variables.Name: NumChannels
Variables.Description: Number of channels of multichannel data; 1 or 2 for regular mono and stereo files

Variables.Name: SampleRate
Variables.Description: Cached sample rate for displaying in the tools

Variables.Name: RawPCMDataSize
Variables.Description: Size of RawPCMData, or what RawPCMData would be if the sound was fully decompressed

Variables.Name: Subtitles
Variables.Description:
Subtitle cues.  If empty, use SpokenText as the subtitle.  Will often be empty,
	  as the contents of the subtitle is commonly identical to what is spoken.

Variables.Name: LocalizedSubtitles
Variables.Description: The array of the subtitles for each language. Generated at cook time.

Variables.Name: Curves
Variables.Description: Curves associated with this sound wave

Variables.Name: InternalCurves
Variables.Description: Hold a reference to our internal curve so we can switch back to it if we want to

Variables.Name: ChannelOffsets
Variables.Description: Offsets into the bulk data for the source wav data

Variables.Name: ChannelSizes
Variables.Description: Sizes of the bulk data for the source wav data

Variables.Name: Comment
Variables.Description: Provides contextual information for the sound to the translator.
